title: Conduct field research into natural and cultural resources
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct field research into natural and cultural resources demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review existing knowledge

pcs.text: Examine existing information gathered through previous investigation to determine key features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine existing information gathered through previous investigation to determine key features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine existing information gathered through previous investigation to determine key features.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify information, records and places previously destroyed or damaged or under threat and report to management.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess scope of information for adequacy against the requirements of legislation, codes of practice, guidelines and cultural protocols.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access appropriate electronic and manual recording systems for data collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access appropriate electronic and manual recording systems for data collection.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access sources of expertise in research environments.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record areas of inadequate information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record areas of inadequate information.
